# Pull request

## Summary
Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / DX
- [ ] Tests / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile` is clean for any files I touched
- [ ] No live API calls in tests; new tests use mocks or sample data
- [ ] No secrets, no hardcoded keys
- [ ] If a config knob was added, it lives in `config.py`
- [ ] README / docstrings updated where behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-visible

## Screenshots (UI changes)
_drag-and-drop or remove this section_

## Notes for reviewers
Anything extra — caveats, follow-ups, open questions.
